title: Reconnect when ready by default option
author: app/
body_snippet:
<!-- Feature Request -->

Add option to "reconnect when ready" by default instead of having to manually select for every tab.

iterations.description: The issue title suggests a 'reconnect when ready' default option but the body is empty with no details on expected behavior, which protocols it applies to, or what 'ready' means in this context.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage: The issue title suggests a 'reconnect when ready' default option but the body is empty with no details on expected behavior, which protocols it applies to, or what 'ready' means in this context.
Approach: Need clarification from reporter on: which protocols (RDP/SSH/all), what triggers 'ready' detection, and whether this means auto-reconnect after disconnect or initial connect retry.
